title: Formula Version
description: Formula Version v1 contract. G0 is research/history reference; G1 is the current operational formula; every change after G1 must create a new version instead of overwriting used formulas.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 G0/G1 boundary and PACK-03 rice-anchor formula scaling. TODO: exact post-G1 version naming policy is not finalized.

formula_code.description: Formula code such as FML-A1-G1 from the 20 SKU catalog.

sku_id.description: SKU governed by this formula version.

generation.description: G0 research/history, G1 operational, POST_G1 for later versions. TODO: define exact post-G1 labels.

anchor_ingredient_id.description: Anchor ingredient, usually rice according to PACK-03.

ratio_to_rice_basis.description: Formula ratio basis: standardized ingredient quantity / standardized rice quantity * 100%.

unit_policy.description: Unit policy retained from pilot-to-approved formula conversion. TODO: define allowed unit policy values.

rounding_policy.description: Rounding policy retained for calculation snapshots. TODO: define allowed rounding policy values.

effective_date.description: Effective date for G1 or later version.
